title: Junior Frontend Developer at Ola Cabs

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Ola Cabs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Ola Cabs in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ola Cabs:
Ola Cabs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs!
